title: Former GIEI Experts Await Government Response on Possible Return
detail: Former GIEI members Ángela Buitrago and Carlos Martín Beristain confirmed they are awaiting a formal response from the Sheinbaum government regarding reintegrating into the Ayotzinapa investigation. The administration had opened negotiations to bring back international experts as part of a new investigative strategy centered on intensive phone-record analysis from September 26, 2014. Families expressed cautious hope that the GIEI's return would reinvigorate the stalled investigation.
